## Summary

Build an **admin dashboard page** (`/admin`) for platform and lender management — register partners, view API keys, and monitor event ingestion without curl/Swagger.

---

## Background

Platform registration uses `POST /api/platforms/register` with `ADMIN_SECRET`. There is no UI for operators. Onboarding partners (#17–#23) requires manual API calls.

---

## Proposed implementation

**Route:** `Front/app/admin/page.tsx` (protected by `ADMIN_SECRET` prompt or env-gated)

**Features (v1):**
| Section | Actions |
|---------|---------|
| Platforms | List, register new, copy API key |
| Lenders | List seed lenders, view profiles |
| Events | Last 50 events with filters |
| Health | Link to API `/health/ready` status |

**API additions:**
- `GET /api/admin/platforms` (requires `X-Admin-Key` header)
- `GET /api/admin/events/recent`

**Auth:** Header `X-Admin-Key: ADMIN_SECRET` — server middleware validates

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Admin routes protected by admin key middleware
- [ ] UI lists platforms from DB
- [ ] Register platform form works end-to-end
- [ ] Recent events table with pagination
- [ ] Not linked in public nav (direct URL only)
- [ ] Swagger docs for new admin endpoints

---

## Related

- #5 seed script
- #17–#23 partner integrations
- #15 production DB required

---

## Out of scope

- Role-based multi-admin
- Audit log export
